message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title flujo psycopg2

participant "psycopg2" as P
participant "conexion" as C
participant "cursor" as Cur
participant "postgres" as Postgres
participant "operacion" as Op

P -> C : defines datos\nde conexion
C -> Cur : permite interactuar\nguarda datos\ntemporalmente
Cur -> Postgres : guarda datos\ncursor.execute
Cur -> Op : borra datos\ncursor.fetchall

@enduml
```
